title: Image Processing Path
description: Build fluency in Image Processing inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Image Segmentation
steps.summary: The process of dividing an image into its constituent parts or objects. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Segmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: A foundational concept in Image Processing — start here to build vocabulary and core intuition before moving to techniques and extensions.

steps.title: Instance Segmentation
steps.summary: The process of identifying and segmenting individual instances of objects within an image. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Segmentation. It opens into AI in Instance Segmentation and Instance Segmentation Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: A foundational concept in Image Processing — start here to build vocabulary and core intuition before moving to techniques and extensions.

steps.title: Affine Transformation
steps.summary: Affine Transformation belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Compare it with YOLOv7-Tiny and YOLOv4-Tiny. It opens into Data Augmentation with Affine Transformation.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Image Processing. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: AI in Augmented Reality Rendering
steps.summary: AI in Augmented Reality Rendering belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after AI in Augmented Reality and AI in Architecture.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Image Processing. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: AI in Panoptic Segmentation
steps.summary: AI in Panoptic Segmentation belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Panoptic Segmentation and Segmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Image Processing. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: AI21 Studio
steps.summary: AI21 Studio belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Compare it with Altered Studio and Panoptic Studio Dataset.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Image Processing. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.

steps.title: Altered Studio
steps.summary: Altered Studio belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Compare it with AI21 Studio and Panoptic Studio Dataset.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Image Processing. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.

steps.title: BEiT
steps.summary: BEiT belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Compare it with semantic segmentation with BEiT and YOLOv7. It opens into semantic segmentation with BEiT.
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Image Processing. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.
